subcodes.first_line: The pure essence of praise and the jewel of glorification beseemeth Him Who hath from time immemorial been sanctified beyond the recognition of the mystics and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ساذج حمد و جوهر ثنا محبوبی را سزاست که لم یزل مقدس بوده از عرفان عرفا و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
